content:
• Path C (Fallen Angel) integrates mythology, literature, and academic challenge.

📌 4. Canvas Structure (Universal for Every Week)

📂 Each Week’s Module Contains:
1. 📖 Overview Page – Lists objectives, key themes, reading assignments.
2. 📚 Readings & Resources – All primary & secondary materials.
3. 🔍 Key Literary Terms – Mini-dictionary for the week.
4. 🗣 Weekly Discussion (Alternates) – Discussion or Close Reading Assignment.
5. ✍ Weekly Writing Assignment – Either a Discussion or Close Reading task.
6. 🤔 Reflection & Catharsis (Day/Night Threads) – Pre & Post-Class writing prompts.
7. ✅ Wrap-Up & Homework Prep – Prep for next week, review key insights.

✅ Why This Works:
• Keeps structure clear & intuitive.
• Tracks engagement & progress directly in Canvas.

📝 5. Weekly Assignments (Alternating Formats)
